title: thymus richardii subsp. ebusitanus
intro: Thymus richardii subsp. ebusitanus is a subspecies of the Thymus richardii plant, commonly known as the Ebusitanus thyme, a type of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been attributed to its essential oil content. The health benefits of Thymus richardii subsp. ebusitanus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and essential oil extracts that can be used topically or ingested, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety in humans.
